rulings.Case Title: D CARSON ENT. VS SACRAMENTO STEELHEADS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO WITHDRAW GRANTED ON CONDITION SUBSTITUTE OBTAINED IN TWO WEEKS AND IF NOT THEN ANSWER TO BE STRIKEN. (PB)

SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2, 3, & 5. X-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD ACTUAL COMMENCEMENT OF REPAIRS AND INTENTIONAL DELAY IN COMPLETION OF REPAIRS TO CAUSE EVICTION OF TENANT AND TO PLEAD DELAYED DISCOVERY AND/OR ACTIVE CONCEALMENT WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4. X-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD CONTRACT IN HAEC VERBA, ACCORDING TO LEGAL INTENDMENT AND EFFECT, OR ATTACH A COPY OF THE INSTRUMENT. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION. NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD ACTIVE CONCEALMENT ALLEGATIONS WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO REMOVE PHYSICAL INJURY ALLEGATIONS. X-COMPLAINANT, HOWEVER, IS PERMITTED TO SEEK EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES. (PB)
